name: handoff
description: Export session context as a structured handoff file for explicit transfer or archival. Use when the user wants a handoff file, session export, cross-tool transfer artifact, or explicit saved summary before ending. Do not treat this as the default Claude continuity path.
codexLead: Recommended routing: `oabtw-codex handoff "<focus>"` for compact session exports. `openagentsbtw-codex` remains the canonical equivalent.
